text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been three days since I was left on this deserted island. What little
provisions I brought along have long since run out, and sadly, my
phone still shows no signal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some break this turned out to be. I never should've signed up for that island tour. Or at the very least, I should've memorized when the return boat was leaving.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I can't turn back time. This is my reality. I close my eyes as my
heart fills with regret. I'll never be able to help Umamusume reach
their full potential now...
Heeey! You okaaay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of someone's voice brings me back to this mortal plane. I
don't recognize them, but whoever it is, their voice is so soothing and
warm.

You must've had it pretty rough, huh? Well, you don't have to worry
anymore. Here, drink up. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The kind stranger helps me sit up and puts a cup to my lips. This
benevolent voice, this sense of security, this strong, sturdy embrace...
Surely, I've come across...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I finish up the water, those warm hands next bring me a bowl of
miso soup. As I eagerly devour the delicious soup, my once-hazy
consciousness begins to come back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And it turns out my "goddess" is actually Hishi Akebono.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, look at you gobble it up. I'm glad I brought some homemade
miso soup with me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But what a surprise this was. I never thought I'd find a trainer from
school collapsed on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I contacted the return ferry by radio just now, so don't worry. We'll
both be back home in no time. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the first time I've seen that friendly smile. Suddenly, I'm
taken back to the recent Tracen Meet, where students who have yet
to debut compete...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Guess what, everybody! As of this morning, I'm officially over 180
centimeters tall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: To celebrate, I'm going to give this race my aaall!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Each racer has entered their gate. The Tracen Meet 1,200-meter turf
race... begins!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono just keeps growing more and more. She's got to be the
biggest Umamusume at Tracen now, right?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
I believe so. And she knows how to use that big body of hers in
races... I've heard lots of trainers have their eyes on her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Passing the finish line by a huge margin, it's Hishi Akebono! She's
taken first place in today's race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still remember the way she blew away the competition with her
speed and strength. But... what's she doing here?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Why, gathering kombu seaweed, silly! I'm buddies with the old
fisherman, so he let me hitch a ride with him.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You see, the kombu seaweed here is filled with lots and lots of minerals, making it perfect for buono dashi stock!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of food, you must be starving. Why don't I throw something
together for you real quick?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Sure! ☆ I brought my outdoor cooking kit with me after all. ♪ Oh, and
I think I have some wild herbs too... I know! Let's make a seafood hot
pot!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Just imagine all those delectable fishies soaking up all that dashi
stock... My tummy's rumbling just thinking about it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: That settles it. Better get started on the fire! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like a master camper, Hishi Akebono sets up her pot in a flash. She
goes to light the fire...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ow, hot, hot! Ahaha... Starting a fire never gets any easier, huh... Ah,
a crab!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, she's got a mountain of seafood before her, which
she likewise prepares in the blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! Now that smells good! Too bad I didn't bring any udon noodles
to sop up the extra broth!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And just like that, before us sits a delicious-looking seafood hot pot.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All right, eat up! ☆ I'm sure it tastes extra buono.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, happy to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I scarf down the hot pot as if in a trance. When I finally look up from
my bowl, I see Hishi Akebono beaming as she watches me eat.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Is it buono?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I can tell from your face. I love watching people enjoy my
food. If only I could find a trainer who understands that...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But when I explain that to the ones scouting me, they all look at me
like I have three heads.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And because of that, I still don't have a trainer...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait a minute! What about you? Would you like to be my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: If you say yes, let's see... I'll make you miso soup eeevery single day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Setting aside the miso soup offer... Her run did leave an impression on me, and I have to admit, she has a unique charm to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My mind made up, I nod my head, signalling my approval.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wow! Really?! Yippee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm so glad I came here today. I can't wait to start training with
you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I know! To celebrate, how about I make your favorite food? What
would you like? Well? Well?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Charmed by her enthusiasm, I tell her my favorite foods without a
second thought... And just like that, my days with Hishi Akebono
have begun.
